\tzpentry{ID5714}{Filament Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5714 introduces Filament Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \lambda_{\text{filament}} = \frac{\pi R_{\text{universe}}}{n} \approx \frac{\pi(c/H_0)}{10^8} \approx 150 \text{ Mpc} \end{equation}
